terms.definition: Open-source component of MLflow that logs runs (params, metrics, artifacts) to a local `mlruns` directory or remote tracking server. Canonical home for MLflow run logging APIs in this curriculum.
Experiment-tracking platform (`wandb`) that logs runs to a project with live metric dashboards, config, and artifacts. Canonical home for W&B run logging APIs here.
A single training execution with a unique ID, owning logged params, metrics history, and artifacts. One `start_run` or `wandb.init` typically creates one run.
MLflow API to record a static hyperparameter or config value on the active run. Duplicate keys overwrite prior values within the same run.
W&B run configuration object — hyperparameters logged via `wandb.config.update` or the `config` argument to `wandb.init`, displayed in the Config tab.
File or directory saved with a run (model checkpoint, plot, CSV). MLflow: `log_artifact`; W&B: `save` or `log_artifact`.
MLflow destination for run data — e.g. `file:./mlruns` or `http://mlflow-server:5000`. Set via `mlflow.set_tracking_uri` or `MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI` env var.
